summary: Completed testing of Customer Experience Simplification Pack. All features working correctly - account shell pages render properly, sidebar navigation updated with new structure, 3 primary actions visible on marketplace/services pages.
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceCapabilitySelector component is defined but not used anywhere in the codebase yet - may need integration into a form
seed_data_creation: None - service catalog tree returns empty as expected (needs seeding)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Experience Simplification Pack fully tested. New /account/* routes working: /account/marketplace (3 primary actions), /account/services (service discovery), /account/assisted-quote (quote request form), /account/orders (unified orders with tabs). Sidebar updated with new navigation structure. Service catalog tree API returns empty array (needs data seeding).

GET /api/service-catalog/tree.details: Returns 200 with empty array (no services seeded yet). Structure validated.

/account/marketplace page renders with 3.details: Browse Marketplace, Request a Service, Let Sales Assist Me - all visible

/account/services page renders with serv.details: Services title, 3 primary actions, placeholder for service discovery grid

/account/assisted-quote page renders wit.details: Form with What do you need?, Estimated quantity/scope, Timeline, Extra notes, Send to Sales button

/account/orders page renders unified My.details: My Orders title, All/Products/Services tabs, empty state with Browse Now CTA

Customer sidebar shows new structure.details: Dashboard, Marketplace (with EARN badge), Services, Let Sales Assist, My Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Recurring Plans, Referrals & Rewards, My Statement, Help - all present

ServiceCapabilitySelector component can.details: Component makes GET /api/service-catalog/tree call. Returns empty array (no data seeded). Component not yet integrated into any form.
